ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot delicately holding a pen, ready to write.  It starts with the arms at rest, then transitions to a writing pose and ends with the arms returning to a slightly relaxed position. The movement emphasizes careful control and precision.  Frame 1: Both arms are at rest at the sides. Frame 2: The right arm moves forward, slightly upward, and inward, the hand positioning itself as if holding a pen. Frame 3:  The right arm is stable in the writing position. The wrist is slightly angled downward for control. Frame 4: The right arm begins to gently return to a more relaxed position, while the left arm remains still. Frame 5: Both arms are slightly relaxed at the sides, the right slightly further forward than the left.

frames.beat: right arm lifts, hand poised to grasp pen
holding the pen steady, ready to write
right arm begins to lower, left arm still
both arms relax slightly at sides
